company.name: Nyamalihi Engineering Ltd
company.tagline: Building Kenya's Infrastructure, One Project at a Time

projects.title: Kisumu–Busia Highway Upgrade
projects.description: Complete rehabilitation and upgrade of 45km dual carriageway including drainage, signage, and road markings.

projects.title: Nairobi Outer Ring Road Phase II
projects.description: Phase II of the Outer Ring Road expansion, 18km urban road with pedestrian walkways, street lighting and modern drainage.

projects.title: Meru County Rural Roads
projects.description: Upgrade of 60km rural access roads connecting farming communities to market centers.

projects.title: Mombasa Port Access Road
projects.description: Heavy-duty access road to the port handling container trucks. Reinforced concrete pavement.

projects.title: Nairobi Convention Centre Annex
projects.description: 8-storey modern office and conference facility with a capacity of 3,000 delegates, green building certified.

projects.title: Thika Road Mall Extension
projects.description: Structural extension to existing retail mall, adding 4 floors and basement parking for 400 vehicles.

projects.title: Kisumu Regional Hospital
projects.description: New 200-bed county referral hospital with ICU, maternity, and modern outpatient facilities.

projects.title: Nakuru Affordable Housing Phase I
projects.description: 180 affordable housing units under the government's Big Four housing agenda, including water, sewer and power infrastructure.

projects.title: Mombasa County Offices
projects.description: A 6-storey county government headquarters with public service hall, council chambers and administration wings.

team.name: Eng. James Nyamalihi
team.qualifications: BSc Civil Engineering, MSc Structural Engineering | NCA Registered

team.name: Eng. Grace Wanjiku
team.qualifications: BSc Civil Engineering | Roads Authority Certified

team.name: Eng. David Ochieng
team.qualifications: BSc Civil & Structural Engineering | IESK Member

services.title: Road Construction
services.description: From rural access roads to major highways. We handle design, earthworks, drainage, surfacing, and road furniture.

services.title: Building Construction
services.description: Residential, commercial, industrial and institutional buildings. Foundation to finishing, structural steel to concrete.

services.title: Bridges & Structures
services.description: Culverts, footbridges, vehicle bridges and retaining walls across Kenya's varied terrain.

services.title: Drainage & Water Works
services.description: Storm drainage, sewerage, water supply infrastructure and flood mitigation systems.

services.title: Engineering Consultancy
services.description: Site surveys, structural design, project supervision, quantity surveying and engineering reports.

services.title: Affordable Housing
services.description: Mass housing developments in partnership with county and national government housing agencies.
